text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Curren. I'm coming back late today, just so
you know.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, for your birthday party, Ayabe? I wanna
come! I can make a cake, and—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
No, don't bother. There's no party. I'm just going
out to do some stargazing.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
It's a special day for me and my family... The stars
out tonight can only be seen once a year.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm... Okay, then I'll make some hot cocoa for
you to take. ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I told you. I don't need anything.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, come on. ♪ It gets chilly on these cool spring
nights! I'm sure your family wouldn't want you to
catch a cold celebrating, and...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: A certain star would be worried about you too.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You got it! I'll make it special and add in some
extra love for your birthday. ♪
